sources.title: FlashAttention-2: Faster Attention with Better Parallelism
Ring Attention: Blockwise Transformers for Near-Infinite Context
Hugging Face: Optimizing Transformers for Production

result.summary: Transformer optimization research has converged on three key areas: attention mechanism efficiency (FlashAttention, GQA, Ring Attention), activation and weight quantization (GPTQ, AWQ, GGUF), and architectural innovations (Mixture of Experts, State Space Models) that collectively enable 4-8x inference speedups.
key_findings: FlashAttention-2 achieves 2x speedup over FlashAttention-1 through better work partitioning across GPU thread blocks, becoming the de facto standard for training runs above 8K context
Grouped Query Attention (GQA) reduces KV-cache memory by 8x compared to multi-head attention with less than 1% quality degradation, adopted by Llama 2, Mistral, and Gemma
Ring Attention enables near-infinite context by distributing attention computation across devices in a ring topology, scaling linearly with the number of devices
